name: Plex — Now Playing
description: Active Plex session (most-recent player). The install flow prompts for a `PLEX_TOKEN` (Plex's `X-Plex-Token` header — the standard `https://plex.tv/api/v2/user` API returns this value for the current user). The http source calls `GET /status/sessions` on the user's Plex server and projects the first `Metadata[0]`'s `title` / `type`. 1x1 shows the title above the media type; 2x2 uses a larger title above a caption-sized type label. NOTE: the server host is per-instance config (`{{host}}`) and the egress entry is templated — the install prompt surfaces an unrestricted warning.
